metadata.overview: Controls a simulated miner over its TCP JSON API. Each device is addressed by deviceId; telemetry reads live stats, commands mutate the device.

telemetry.name: hashrate_rt
telemetry.description: Real-time hashrate. 0 implies offline or booting.

commands.name: reboot
commands.constraints: Do not call more than once in a 15-minute window.

commands.name: setPowerLimit
commands.description: Set the power limit in watts.

errors.ERR_DEVICE_CALL_FAILED: The device rejected or failed the vendor API call.
